nasb.text: There were latticed windows and palm trees on one side and on the other, on the sides of the porch; thus were the side chambers of the house and the thresholds.

esv.text: And there were narrow windows and palm trees on either side, on the sidewalls of the vestibule, the side chambers of the temple, and the canopies.

cnv.text: 門廊兩邊都有小窗和棕樹。殿的廂房也有飛簷。

ccb.text: 圣殿门廊的墙壁上有格子窗和棕树雕刻，厢房都有房檐。
